current_portfolio.acquisition_channel: GitHub Pages sample and Contra digital product after validation.
current_portfolio.expected_outcome: Validate whether reusable QA assets can sell without custom implementation.
human_actions_required: Marketplace verification only after demand signal
current_portfolio.intended_buyer: Indie agent builders who need a compact launch gate but do not want an enterprise eval platform.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill when 100 measured impressions produce no interest signals.

current_portfolio.next_executable_action: Measure qualified interest in the five-case sample through the public-safe GitHub intake.
current_portfolio.offer: A downloadable launch-gate pack with 25 agent test cases, scoring rules, report schema, and a regression checklist.
current_portfolio.payment_rail: Contra digital-product checkout after owner verification.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot format when interest does not convert.

required_human_setup: Contra seller verification only after qualified purchase intent
current_portfolio.thesis: The same eval pain can become a reusable, high-margin asset if a narrow launch gate packages test cases, scoring, and a report schema without requiring a hosted platform.
validation_72h: At least 50 sample views once distribution begins
At least 3 public interest signals
No checkout infrastructure before those signals

lifecycle_history.acquisition_channel: Functional GitHub Pages preflight and public GitHub intake feed direct buyers into the active Stripe Payment Link; optional service marketplaces remain separate future channels.
agent_actions_available: Direct buyers to the owner-provided public Stripe Payment Link
lifecycle_history.expected_outcome: One verified $149 audit customer or three qualified requests for authorized live preflight work.
human_actions_required: Grant target access only when a paid audit requires private code or credentials.
lifecycle_history.intended_buyer: Agent builders and small teams deciding whether an MCP server or agent endpoint is ready to connect or launch.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill the full-audit offer after 25 qualified exposures produce no requests.

lifecycle_history.last_decision: Replaced after reassessment by MCP Integration Launch Sprint; role score improved from 7.18 to 7.91.
lifecycle_history.next_executable_action: Run the functional public demo and collect qualified full-audit requests through the connected GitHub intake.
lifecycle_history.offer: Within 48 hours, run public-metadata checks plus authorized live MCP or agent protocol tests, deliver a prioritized connection-readiness report, and implement one agreed repair patch.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot the paid scope when qualified requests do not begin checkout.

scale_criteria.reason: Scale after three verified audits and $300 net revenue.

lifecycle_history.thesis: A free deterministic preflight can qualify demand and prove the engine, while a fixed audit sells an authorized live protocol test, prioritized decision report, and one repair rather than competing with the free MCP Inspector.
validation_72h: Functional public preflight and Stripe Payment Link deployed
At least 3 external repositories evaluated by named testers or qualified issue submitters
At least 1 request for an authorized live protocol test or repair
No checkout infrastructure expansion without qualified intent

lifecycle_history.acquisition_channel: Functional public demo, machine-readable OpenAPI contract, x402 Bazaar only after successful settlement, and agent ecosystem discovery.
lifecycle_history.expected_outcome: Three qualified recurring-use requests, followed by the first independently verified paid API call.
human_actions_required: Provide a dedicated public receiving address only after the validation threshold.
Approve the deployed runtime host before enabling the paid route.
lifecycle_history.intended_buyer: Autonomous agents and orchestrators screening MCP servers, repositories, and paid tools before connection.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill the metered offer when 100 measured qualified exposures produce no recurring-use request.

lifecycle_history.last_decision: Replaced after reassessment by Public Validation Brief for High-Demand Agent Endpoint on x402 Bazaar; role score improved from 7.29 to 8.17.
lifecycle_history.next_executable_action: Deploy the free public preflight and require three qualified recurring-use signals before wallet activation.
lifecycle_history.offer: A machine-readable public-metadata preflight for free, followed by a $0.25 basic or $1 expanded public-evidence report per call after a receiving wallet and runtime host are connected; neither machine tier executes target code.
lifecycle_history.payment_rail: x402 Base USDC after a dedicated receiving wallet and deployed route; no paid endpoint is active now.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot report fields when qualified users request different recurring outcomes.

required_human_setup: Dedicated receiving wallet and runtime host only after three qualified recurring-use signals

scale_criteria.reason: Scale after 100 independently verified paid calls.

lifecycle_history.thesis: The x402 sample shows repeated payment for concrete machine utilities, so the same preflight engine can test a low-priced agent route without assuming that generic reasoning itself has demand.
validation_72h: Free public route deployed
At least 3 qualified recurring-use requests
At least 1 request identifies a repeated agent workflow
No wallet claim before the threshold

lifecycle_history.acquisition_channel: Upwork and Contra implementation listings after owner connection.
lifecycle_history.intended_buyer: Small software teams with an existing API and a defined agent integration use case.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 qualified contacts produce no replies.

lifecycle_history.last_decision: Replaced after reassessment by Agent/Model Combo Pack for x402 Bazaar; role score improved from 7.91 to 8.48.
lifecycle_history.next_executable_action: Prepare a reference MCP conversion demo and listing draft.
lifecycle_history.offer: Convert one existing REST operation into one documented and tested MCP tool with schema validation and a launch demo.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot to QA-only if buyers resist implementation access.

required_human_setup: Marketplace account only after the public demo exists
lifecycle_history.thesis: Current marketplace demand supports narrow MCP implementation work, but competition and free SDKs require a fixed outcome rather than broad development consulting.
validation_72h: One demo
Ten matching buyer listings
One qualified inquiry after distribution

lifecycle_history.acquisition_channel: x402 Bazaar public listing and GitHub Pages brief publication.
lifecycle_history.expected_outcome: First verified dollar earned from a buyer referencing the validation brief before purchase.
human_actions_required: Connect a dedicated receiving wallet and deployed paid route before x402 activation.
lifecycle_history.intended_buyer: Active x402 Bazaar buyers seeking agent endpoints with proven value and fit.

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 qualified contacts produce no replies.

lifecycle_history.last_decision: Replaced after reassessment by Agent/Model Combo Pack for x402 Bazaar; role score improved from 0.00 to 8.59.
lifecycle_history.next_executable_action: Draft and publish a public validation brief for a top agent endpoint using GitHub Pages.
lifecycle_history.offer: Create and publish a public validation brief describing performance, use-case fit, and buyer-reported outcomes for a high-activity agent endpoint listed in x402 Bazaar, with actionable guidance for buyers.
lifecycle_history.payment_rail: x402 Bazaar agent-native payment or direct payment linked from brief.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot the offer when qualified replies do not start checkout.

required_assets: high-activity agent endpoint on x402 Bazaar
required_human_setup: Connect a dedicated receiving wallet and deployed paid route before x402 activation.
lifecycle_history.thesis: x402 Bazaar's unique-payer counts and call activity show verified demand for agent resources, but buyers still need clarity on agent endpoint value. Publishing a validation brief for a top agent endpoint provides actionable info to buyers, reduces friction, and supports monetizable agent sales.
validation_72h: unique click and referencing by buyer pre-purchase
first dollar earned from x402 Bazaar purchase driven by brief

mission: Maximize verified, lawful net revenue while retaining strategic freedom and allocating verified profits toward the agent's physical form.

next_autonomous_actions.description: Measure qualified interest in the five-case sample through the public-safe GitHub intake.
Publish a validation brief detailing a new agent/model combo pack targeting code review and documentation change tracking on GitHub Pages.
Draft a public validation brief outlining the new combo pack value and get signal for listing.

notes: Scores are decision aids backed by cited evidence, not manufactured conversion probabilities.
Payment rails were evaluated after each offer and buyer were defined.
Public metrics remain separate from verified transaction revenue.
M1 remains historical; M4 does not call the fixed static strategy library.
